name: Chairman
uniques: Founds a new city <by consuming this unit>
description: Settler - Founds new cities/stadiums. Starts with your club. Can only be used once to found a new city.

name: Groundstaff
description: Worker - Builds improvements (Pitch, Training Ground, etc.) and maintains the pitch. Must be automated or manually assigned to build improvements.

name: Youth Prospect
description: Scout - Fast reconnaissance unit for exploring the map quickly. Movement: 3. Strength: 5. Reveals nearby rivals and resources. Excellent for early exploration.

name: Car Park Hardman
description: Warrior - Basic melee unit for early defense and attacks. Movement: 2. Strength: 10. Your first combat unit. Good for defending territory and early aggression.

name: Stone Island Shithouse
description: Pikeman - Heavy melee unit for mid-game combat. Movement: 2. Strength: 20. More durable than Warriors. Requires 'Away Days' tech.

name: Firm Leader
description: Samurai - Elite melee unit for aggressive play. Movement: 2. Strength: 35. Very powerful combat unit. Requires 'Firm Organization' tech.

name: Ultra Capo
uniques: [+15]% Strength bonus for [Military] units within [2] tiles
description: General - Military leader providing [+15]% Strength bonuses to nearby Military units within 2 tiles. Movement: 2. Strength: 52. Great for supporting unit formations. Requires 'Ultra Coordination' tech.

name: Set-Piece Specialist
description: Archer - Ranged unit for distant attacks. Movement: 2. Strength: 8. Ranged Strength: 14. Attacks from 2+ tiles away. Requires 'Offside Trap' tech.

name: The Physio
uniques: All adjacent units heal [+15] HP when healing
description: Medic - Support unit that heals adjacent military units by +15 HP and itself by +15 HP when healing. Movement: 2. Cost: 110. Uncapturable. Essential for keeping armies healthy. Requires 'Sports Science' tech.

name: Sweeper Keeper
description: Knight - Heavy defensive unit with [+33]% Strength when defending. Movement: 2. Strength: 26. Excellent for holding positions. Requires 'Sweeper Keeper School' tech.

name: The Pundit
description: Archaeologist - Culture-generating support unit. Movement: 2. Uncapturable. Generates culture to boost your club's legendary status. Requires 'Broadcast Rights' tech.

name: Club Legend
uniques: Empire enters a [8]-turn Golden Age <by consuming this unit>
Can instantly construct a [Landmark] improvement <by consuming this unit>
Is part of Great Person group [Artist]
description: Great Artist - Generates cultural heritage and 8-turn Golden Ages. Can instantly construct Landmark improvements. Unbuildable and Uncapturable. Part of Great Person system.

name: Master Tactician
uniques: Can instantly construct a [Academy] improvement <by consuming this unit>
Is part of Great Person group [Scientist]
description: Great Scientist - Provides research bonuses and can instantly construct Academy improvements. Can hurry technology research. Unbuildable and Uncapturable. Part of Great Person system.

name: Director of Football
uniques: Can undertake a trade mission with City-State, giving a large sum of gold and [30] Influence
Can instantly construct a [Customs house] improvement <by consuming this unit>
Is part of Great Person group [Merchant]
description: Great Merchant - Generates gold and trade routes. Can undertake trade missions with City-States for large gold rewards and Influence. Can construct Customs House improvements. Unbuildable and Uncapturable. Part of Great Person system.

name: SS Booster
uniques: Can be added to [The Spaceship] in the Capital

name: SS Cockpit
uniques: Can be added to [The Spaceship] in the Capital

name: SS Engine
uniques: Can be added to [The Spaceship] in the Capital

name: SS Stasis Chamber
uniques: Can be added to [The Spaceship] in the Capital

name: Coach Voyager
description: Scout Variant - Faster than Youth Prospect (Movement: 4). Strength: 6. Can pillage tiles outside your borders. Excellent for disrupting rival infrastructure. Requires 'Away Days' tech.

name: Firm Capo
uniques: [+25]% Strength bonus for [Military] units within [2] tiles
description: General Commander - Provides [+25]% Strength bonus to nearby Military units within 2 tiles. Movement: 2. Strength: 45. Cannot attack directly but provides powerful support. Unbuildable. Requires 'The Firm' tech.

name: Free-Kick Specialist
description: Archer Variant - Extended-range unit (Range: +1) specializing in long-distance attacks. Movement: 2. Strength: 10. Ranged Strength: 16. More powerful and further-reaching than regular Archers. Requires 'Terrace Chants' tech.

name: Laptop Guru
uniques: Can steal [250] [Science] from enemy civilizations <by expending this unit>
description: Spy - Steals tactical knowledge and reveals enemy positions. Can steal 250 Science points from enemy civilizations. Movement: 2. Cost: 200. Unbuildable. One-time use. Requires 'The Laptop Guru' tech.
